summary: Phase 4 (Stripe Subscription Setup, Dollar Value Upgrades, Daily BL Claim) testing completed. All 35 backend tests passed. Frontend SubscriptionTiers.jsx displays all 5 tiers correctly with proper pricing, XP multipliers, daily BL bonuses, and mint limits.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Duplicate route for POST /api/minting/photos/{mint_id}/upgrade - removed duplicate and fixed UpgradeDollarValueRequest model to not require mint_id in body (already in path)
subscription_tiers.py: All 5 tiers correctly defined with proper pricing (Free $0, Bronze $4.99, Silver $9.99, Gold $14.99, Platinum $24.99)
minting_routes.py: GET /api/minting/upgrade-prices returns all 10 upgrade options ($1M to $1B)
minting_routes.py: GET /api/minting/subscription/info returns current tier and benefits
minting_routes.py: POST /api/minting/subscription/claim-daily-bl correctly rejects free tier users
minting_routes.py: POST /api/minting/photos/{mint_id}/upgrade correctly validates ownership and BL balance
SubscriptionTiers.jsx: All 5 tiers displayed with correct pricing and benefits
SubscriptionTiers.jsx: 'BEST VALUE' badge on Gold tier, 'ELITE' badge on Platinum tier
SubscriptionTiers.jsx: Ranked Profile section shows user rating and stats
SubscriptionTiers.jsx: Ranked Tiers section shows all 6 ranked tiers (Bronze to Master)
Note: Gold and Platinum Stripe price IDs are placeholders (price_gold_placeholder, price_platinum_placeholder) - need to create in Stripe dashboard

success_rate.frontend: 100% (SubscriptionTiers page loads correctly with all tiers displayed)

seed_data_creation: None - test user is on free tier with 50,000 BL coins
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully implemented and verified. Test user test2@blendlink.com is on free tier. All subscription tier endpoints working. Dollar value upgrade endpoint fixed (was duplicate route issue). Gold and Platinum Stripe price IDs are placeholders.

bug_fixed.issue: Duplicate route for POST /api/minting/photos/{mint_id}/upgrade with conflicting request models
bug_fixed.fix: Removed duplicate route and fixed UpgradeDollarValueRequest model to not require mint_id in body
